subcodes.first_line: Immeasurable praise beseemeth the sanctified court of the Peerless One, Who through the effulgence of the Sun of inner meanings hath illumined human hearts [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ستایش بیقیاس ساحت حضرت بیمثالیرا سزاست که باشراق انوار شمس معانی قلوب انسانیه
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
